title: Automated Code Completion
scenario: Write a JavaScript function that takes an array of integers as input and returns the sum of all the even numbers in the array. The function should be named 'sumEvenNumbers' and should be defined inside a module named 'mathUtils'. The function should be exported and should be reusable across the entire application.
constraints: Function should be defined inside a module named 'mathUtils'
Function should be reusable across the entire application

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the function is defined correctly and takes the correct input.
Check if the function adheres to the given constraints.
Check if the code is readable and follows best practices.
Check if the function is exported correctly.
